LanguageData.VSIE_AttendedBingeParty.stages.0.descrip: I had a great time at the binge party.

LanguageData.VSIE_HadNiceChatWithBeer.stages.0.descri: I enjoyed the little chit chat and a cold one in my hand.

LanguageData.VSIE_InspirationNotSatisfied.stages.0.de: I have failed to complete my aspiration.
